_comment: KEY = a YNAB category name exactly as it appears in the budget; VALUE = list of UPPERCASE substrings matched against the raw bank description. First category with a hit wins (top-to-bottom). A transaction is only categorized if the KEY exists in the budget (case-insensitive); otherwise it lands uncategorized, so a wrong name here is harmless. Keys starting with _ are ignored. Inflows route to 'Inflow: Ready to Assign' automatically.
